programme.title: The Office: Junior Salesman

programme.title: The Office: Vandalism
programme.desc: When Pam asks the office to help her track down the vandal who defaced her mural, Dwight and Nellie spring to action. Darryl has difficulty dealing with the cleanliness habits of Jim in their shared Philly apartment.

programme.title: The Office: Couples Discount

programme.desc: After the stabbing death of a woman who was apparently killed by someone wearing a ninja outfit, Brenda and the squad realize they might have a bigger case on their hands than they thought.

programme.title: The Closer: The Life
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a 12-year-old boy found dead in a known gang party house. The case is soon complicated when two more bodies are found at a different yet related house. Meanwhile, trouble brews in Provenza's romantic paradise.

programme.title: The Closer: Make Over
programme.desc: Several old cases that were previously closed are suddenly re-opened after a crime lab is discredited. Provenza's former partner, Det. Andrews, comes out of retirement to help with a case involving artwork theft and murder.

programme.title: The Closer: Dead Man's Hand
programme.desc: Captain Raydor approaches Major Crime about looking into a possible case of spousal abuse involving one of her female officers. Brenda and Raydor discover there is more to the story when another officer kills the abused woman's husband.

programme.title: Movie: The Twelve Trees of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is excited to celebrate the Christmas season with her community. She learns the historic library where she works is scheduled to be demolished. She rallies the community and organizes a Christmas tree decorating contest to draw media attention.

programme.title: Movie: Love for Christmas
programme.desc: After their mutual childhood crushes, two former classmates reunite for a Christmas romance.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Proposal
programme.desc: A lawyer second-guesses his proposals to both his job and his fiancé while rekindling his love for an old flame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Hope
programme.desc: Doctors discover a shocking secret while treating a young mother who is dying of cancer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hearts of Darkness
programme.desc: Two survivalists continually butt heads in the Cambodian jungle. In the face of extreme heat and crocodile filled waters, their lack of teamwork may be their downfall.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A Navy vet and a military mom tackle the harsh conditions of Mexico's uninhabitable Cayo Venado. A prowling black panther, tree sap poisonous to the touch, and a week of freezing rain lead this pair of survivalists right up to the breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: All or Nothing
programme.desc: A hunter from Louisiana meets a California surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in and the duo spends most of their time securing a reliable water source to ensure their survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Jungle Love
programme.desc: Two survivalists are challenged to survive the Nicaraguan rain forest. Battling freezing nights, severe dehydration and each other, they must work together to survive even though one is a vegetarian and the other is a meat eater.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: River, Rain and Jealousy
programme.desc: A two-against-one dynamic hinders progress for a group of three while torrential rains and pumas threaten a duo all in the jungles of Ecuador. Meanwhile, a special ops vet and a single mom battle Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Surviving the Elements
programme.desc: An Alaskan homesteader works with her partner in the 130-degree heat of the Mexican jungle after suffering a deadly spider bite. Later, survivalists face extreme temperature changes after being dropped into a high-altitude jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped on a deserted Dominica beach. When Dominica claims a casualty, surviving in a barren tropical terrain may prove to be too great a challenge.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: An epic Clash of Titans grips the gold mining fleet as Shawn constructs the largest washplant in Nome and Ken's mining monster roars to life. Vern prospects using his new innovations. Ripping currents threaten the Kellys.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers
programme.desc: Mike and his wife Valerie crash a high-stakes poker game to learn the location of a jet. Ken and Danny hunt down the luxury yacht of a womanizing sleaze bag. And Kevin has his life threatened when he attempts to repo a debtor's crop duster.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo 911
programme.desc: Kevin poses as an interviewer to gain access to a Westwind jet, Ken and Danny valet a car to get the keys to a Cessna CJ3, and Mike repos an air ambulance, but not before he rescues their final lifesaving mission.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bedazzled Truck Driver
programme.desc: Feisty Rebecca has lost 90 pounds and won't let her mom keep her from her dream dress. Plus-size Cassidy has her heart set on one particular Hayley Paige gown. Plus, a glam wedding proves you're never too old to be a princess.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Hard to Say I'm Sorry
programme.desc: Tim must make an important decision. Benjamin negotiates the bride price. Darcey confides in Tom's sister. Avery and Omar must say goodbye. Angela tries to make amends, and Rebecca reveals a bombshell.

programme.title: My 40 Year Old Child
programme.desc: Nicky Freeman is 40 with the body of a ten year old. Gabby Williams is six but no different to a newborn. Both age one year for every four and doctors have no idea why.

programme.title: Girls Who Don't Age
programme.desc: Follow the incredible story of three girls who have stopped ageing. Frozen in time and destined to live their lives as toddlers, what is affecting these girls, how are they cheating time and could they help us unlock the secrets of the ageing process?

programme.title: Born Schizophrenic: January's Story: Jani's Next Chapter
programme.desc: Jani is one of the youngest children ever diagnosed with schizophrenia. At age 9, she's seen great improvements and some setbacks. But now her parent's attention turns toward her brother, Bodhi. At age 4, is he showing signs of schizophrenia too.

programme.title: Born Schizophrenic: Big Changes
programme.desc: Susan Schofield is raising two children with mental illnesses, schizophrenia and autism.

programme.title: Born Schizophrenic: Big Changes
programme.desc: Susan Schofield is raising two children with mental illnesses, schizophrenia and autism.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Living Apart
programme.desc: Theresa experiences her first dose of living apart from Larry as she spends time with her kids and father. Finding healing in her work, Theresa gives a special gift to skeptical newlyweds channeling both of their fathers who died before their wedding.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: No Time to Play
programme.desc: When Ethan Jones finishes his MBA program, the whole family takes a trip to Baylor University in Waco, Texas for his graduation ceremony.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Family First
programme.desc: The Jones family take a 16-hour, cross-country trip to Iowa so the quints can meet their great-grandparents for the first time.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: While the Busbys Are Away the Quints Will Play!
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle head to Nashville, leaving the family to watch the quints. But they may not be up to the challenge, especially when Hazel gives her uncle a big scare. While away, Adam confronts the fact he's not the only one suffering from his issues.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Battle of the Busby Baby Photos
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle compete to see who can take the cutest photo of the quints to promote the new cycle studio. Later, Danielle stresses about her upcoming charity fundraiser while Adam takes a step towards dealing with his emotional issues.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Can't Breathe
programme.desc: A single mother is on the verge of losing custody of her 10-year-old daughter as a result of years of compulsive hoarding.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Overtaken by Puppets
programme.desc: Once a professional ventriloquist, Donna's career became an obsession with hundreds of puppets in her home.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Shark!
programme.desc: A patient is brought to the ER with a live shark clamped onto his thigh.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Why Am I Blue?
programme.desc: An ER doctor can't figure out why his patient has blue skin. A teen girl has suffered for years with abdominal pains that no doctor can explain. A doctor attempts to keep the lone survivor of a plane crash alive.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Sitcom Spirits
programme.desc: It's an hour of sitcom legends as Theresa gives readings to Martin's Tisha Campbell, Facts of Life's Mindy Cohn, Cheers' John Ratzenberger, Designing Women and Young Sheldon's Annie Potts and I Dream Of Jeannie icon Barbara Eden.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: A Year of Separation
programme.desc: Theresa adjusts as she and Larry get closer to divorce. A skeptic turns when his dad is channeled. Meet Theresa's mother for the first time and the family thinks Larry Jr will pop the question at a party for his girlfriend.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Readings and Renovations
programme.desc: Theresa unexpectedly reads one of the construction workers in her home. In a group reading, she changes the mind of a skeptic who lost his son in a car accident. Later, with Larry living in LA, Theresa tries to spend time with her family.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: An Accident on Tour
programme.desc: Theresa is sidelined after a severe accident. But she doesn't remain silent, conducting readings at her doctor's office and directly after surgery. Housebound, Theresa must open her home for group readings for the first time in years.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Strippendales
programme.desc: Jenni gets involved with Ronnie's relationship, Vinny bares it all on the Chippendales stage, and Pauly pulls the ultimate prank: cue Uncle Nino.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Incident at the Strip Club
programme.desc: Uncle Nino, Ronnie's baby mama, and JWoww's new boyfriend walk into a bar...

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Millennials

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a For Sale By Owner property in Garden Grove, California. This type of sale is always exciting for a flipper because it means no real estate agent commissions and an opportunity to negotiate a fair sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cracked Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a newer home that has seen better days but has great potential.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: New Flips, Familiar Faces

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beachside Beauty
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Torrance, California, that's just miles from the ocean and several upscale beach communities. The yard is small and tiered, but buyers in this area demand luxury and are willing to pay top dollar to get it.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Dilapidated Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Money Flip

programme.desc: A professional bouncer from New York moves to Missouri to ensure that a rowdy bar is safer for the patrons and musicians. When trouble is started by a local businessman, an old friend comes to town to help protect the bar's liquor shipments from thugs.

programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Mid-life Murder
programme.desc: Arthur Burney believes it's true love when he runs off with Patricia Meeks, the waitress from his favorite bar. And soon Arthur and Patricia have a daughter of their own. But 16 years later, tensions are stretched to the limit, and someone will snap.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: In-Laws and Outlaws
programme.desc: A law professor gunned down in Tallahassee. Suspects arrested clear across the state one of them a reputed gang leader. And the question what was the connection? A tangled web of relationships and cash deposits place a family under the microscope.

programme.title: 20/20: Dying to Be Famous: The Versace Murders
programme.desc: We take a look back at the murder of Gianni Versace in the summer of 1997. 20 years later, many questions still remain. We investigate the twisting path of the making of serial killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Family Business
programme.desc: An armored truck driver and his family commit a series of heists, eluding authorities for over a decade. But when one of them starts flashing the cash, their plan for living the good life begins to crumble.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Mister Wrong
programme.desc: Ty Underwood leaves her insular hometown to start fresh, vowing to be up-front with potential suitors about being transgender. Her shocking murder exposes chats with anonymous men on a phone app. The app may reveal a killer, but not identities.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Evil Among Us
programme.desc: In early August 2015, Jeffrey Kebler is found dead in his Clinton County, MI home. In order to track down his killer, detectives must follow a digital trail left by the victim. What they end up uncovering is way more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: January 2013, high school freshman Shaniesha Forbes' body is found on a Brooklyn beach. NYPD Detectives begin piecing together her final moments and discover her social media life including a list of 1,600 Facebook friends and potential suspects.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Married couple Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to take a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Battling the Elements
programme.desc: Firefighter Jack Pritchard fearlessly charges into blazing infernos to rescue victims, and when Hurricane Katrina pounded New Orleans, John Keller stepped up to save residents of his apartment building.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room

programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Master Suite Disaster
programme.desc: Rob overhauls the master bedroom and transforms it into an oasis with a view. Glass doors replace the entire wall and open up to a brand new balcony with its own spiral staircase. His final touch is a TV that drops from the ceiling.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Great Expansions
programme.desc: The ninjas are tasked with shaking up the main living room. They install all-new lighting to brighten up the dark space while the newly installed ceiling tiles add a touch of glamour. The finishing touch is a sea-inspired chandelier that's center stage.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Taking Charge of the Yard
programme.desc: This property's unsightly guesthouse is the only thing standing in the way of its curb appeal. After removing the structure the team take care of the law.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Spacing Out
programme.desc: After taking a trip to the Kennedy Space Center, Rob gets an out-of-this-world idea for an outdoor water feature: a rocket themed splash pad! It has all the bells and whistles including water jets and lights that make this outdoor oasis perfect.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Hot Rod Garage
programme.desc: A great house is not complete without the ultimate garage. This project includes a TV and lounge seating for a multifunctional space that shines. New pavers and a dazzling front gate make this one garage that's hard to drive by.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Sealing The Deal
programme.desc: Every inch of this house has been fully updated, customized and improved. It's a beautiful space perfect for entertaining, relaxing, or just having fun. This home keeps it real and at the end of the day, that's what seals the deal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 14-Mile House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis juggles two projects in Detroit, and since both were built in 1928, she uses one house as inspiration for the other's renovations. When a car crashes into the house next door, she makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brightening the Bedrooms
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the upstairs bedrooms and bathroom which have had their natural beauty covered in old wallpaper and fixtures.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: She's a Brick House
programme.desc: Poison ivy, broken windows and a cramped patio are just a few items that need to be addressed if this couple wants to turn their home into the haven it was nearly two decades ago. Chris and Sara refresh the home with a low-maintenance design.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Guest House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heather and immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Between the Bun
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson reveals entirely excessive and utterly outrageous takes on the humble hamburger. Beef patties and two buns are required, but every other ingredient is maxed out to create the most exorbitant burgers ever imagined.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: #throwback
programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Princess Cupcakes

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Tropical Island Cakes
programme.desc: Three bakers battle in a speedy elimination round using coconut rum as their mystery ingredient. The last two standing compete for $10,000 in a tropical island-themed cake showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Spring Cakes
programme.desc: Three bakers compete in an elimination round using beets, two make it to the spring-themed cake showdown, and one will walk away $10,000 richer.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Wedding Cakes

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Garden Pies
programme.desc: The bakers face nutmeg in the elimination round before taking on the garden-themed pie showdown.

programme.desc: Suzanne's client has her rocking to an Elvis-inspired juke box cake, while Phil and Christine sculpt a seahorse of great magnitude at the Cake International competition. Ben's horror and gore designs delight in a ghoulish cake of devilish proportions.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Ball Gown Celebration Cake
programme.desc: In Lancashire, Molly Robbins has a very tall order: a celebration cake for a flamboyant customer to help him celebrate 35 years as a drag artist. The cake will be a life-size ball gown, complete with 50 edible peacock feathers and 3000 gold flowers.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Big Ben and Wearable Hat Cakes
programme.desc: London comes to Las Vegas in a wedding shower creation that's ready for high tea, then cake and ice cream get a whole new meaning. Plus, a spinning masterpiece shines like crystals but is completely edible.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Luxurious and Playful Cakes
programme.desc: Luxurious details and elegant decor make for a most-extravagant wedding cake. Then zoo animals come to life, sugar looks like hand-blown glass, and a duck rides a mechanical bull on a super playful birthday cake.

programme.title: Good Eats: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Alton shares how to make donuts and how the donut really got its hole.

programme.title: Good Eats: It's A Wonderful Cake
programme.desc: Alton Brown is out to prove that fruitcake shouldn't be the butt of holiday jokes anymore.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The King Of Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four cupcake makers will fight for the opportunity to serve their very own cupcakes at a Memphis party in celebration of The King, Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Celebrity: Cupcakes in Space

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug

programme.title: PJ Masks: Secret of the Pagoda/ Storm of the Ninja
programme.desc: While Catboy is too busy trying to impress An Yu, Night Ninja enters the pagoda. An Yu tries to solve an ancient riddle to become a true Mountain Master.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fly Boy/ Temporary Fairy
programme.desc: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, 'Fly Boy.' Cosmo and Wanda are too busy taking care of Poof to tend to an overly adventurous Timmy, so he wishes up a 'temporary fairy' and Jorgen is more than happy to fulfill Timmy's wishes.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Man's Worst Friend
programme.desc: In order to make Timmy and his family miserable, Foop replaces Sparky with the Anti-Sparky. When that plan works, Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy be replacing everyone's pet with an evil pet.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy IV/ Doing Time
programme.desc: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are eating when Mermaid Man accidentally drops his belt.

programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: Movie: Friday

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Have Yourself a Very Little Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is driving everyone a little crazy as they all search for the perfect gifts.

programme.title: Frasier: Bla-Z-Boy
programme.desc: Frasier chafes at the notion that he and his father are like an old married couple.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Hundredth Episode

programme.title: Frasier: Sharing Kirby
programme.desc: Wine connoisseurs Frasier and Niles vie for control of the incompetent teenager, Kirby.

programme.title: Frasier: Junior Agent

programme.title: Frasier: Bully for Martin

programme.title: Frasier: Juvenilia

programme.title: Movie: Love by Chance

programme.title: Movie: Truly, Madly, Sweetly

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons

programme.title: South Park: Let Them Eat Goo
programme.desc: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped: The Alex Cooper Story
programme.desc: After coming out as gay, a young woman's parents send her to an abusive Mormon conversion camp.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Snake Researcher

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Penguin Keeper

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Snake Wrangler
programme.desc: Mike Rowe travels to Texas and joins forces with a local snake farm that is dedicated to raising some of the biggest and most dangerous snakes in the world. It's a dirty job that has Mike scared for his life as he moves giant and at times angry snakes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger

programme.title: Long Lost Family: A Slamming Door

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Coral Palms Pt. 3
programme.desc: The team makes a road trip to Florida to try to help Jake and Holt take down Figgis. With an unforeseen injury and yet another interruption by Sheriff Reynolds, the plan doesn't follow through quite like they all had hoped.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Night Shift
programme.desc: As Jake struggles with his first case back at the precinct, he encounters Jess Day, who is visiting New York, and enlists her to help him find his suspect.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Halloween IV
programme.desc: It's Halloween in the Nine-Nine which can only mean one thing: heist time. This year, the squad members pull out all the stops in their quest to win the new defending title of 'Ultimate Detective Slash Genius.'

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Monster in the Closet
programme.desc: Pimento and Rosa decide to pick up where they left off and get married, so the whole squad preps a perfect wedding under Amy's careful direction. Pimento enlists Jake and Gina to hunt for his grandmother's ruby earrings for Rosa to wear in the ceremony.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Mr. Santiago
programme.desc: At Amy's intricately planned Thanksgiving dinner, Jake goes 'full Santiago' (binder and all) in order to impress her father, a former cop. With Jake and Amy's focus elsewhere, Charles is left on turkey duty.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Skyfire Cycle
programme.desc: When famous author DC Parlov receives death threats, Jake and Terry take the case so that Terry can meet his lifelong hero.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Training Day
programme.desc: The Tacoma FD's negligence during a firehouse school trip makes Councilwoman Price so angry that she orders the guys to complete a training recertification with an old nemesis who's just itching to fail them.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Full Moon Fever
programme.desc: FD braces for a night of insane full moon rescue calls. Plus, Eddie and Grannie go on active appendage duty and Ike gets bitten into an altered state.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Old Flame
programme.desc: All New Eddie runs into his cradle-robbing first love and must decide whether to rekindle his romance with the sexy senior citizen. Then, Granny and Lucy compete to win the affections of an androgynous dispatcher and Terry discovers moisturizer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Where's the Beefcake
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tries to take nudity out of the annual Firefighters' Beefcake Calendar and the crew must get creative to maintain the integrity of its sexy (and oily) tradition.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Two-Week Girl
programme.desc: Funny woman Tyree Elaine wants you to know she is tired of your relationship statuses, Nate Jackson has a hilarious message for the church, and Alycia Cooper takes a non-smoker's break so she can think outside the cubicle.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Chaunte Wayans learns that a gas station is a foodie's paradise, Fatimah Taliah has a wild night out, and Reyna Amaya can't stand girls who won't pee in the street. Plus, Mark Viera gives us a one-two punch in the joke of the night.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Nostalgia Trip
programme.desc: Tony Baker goes old school with tales from the lunch room, Davell Taylor has a come-to-Jesus moment in church, and things get awkward when Shatara Curry brings her work crush home. Plus, Mark Viera reminisces about the beeper days.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Anti-protest Protest
programme.desc: The always funny Chaunte Wayans is back to reminisce about an old love, and Dave Helem has a run-in with the anti-gluten brigade. Plus, Pretty Ricki's daughter is spilling tea on the entire congregation.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 5
programme.desc: Questionably brilliant innovations in portable toilets, beer-finding technology, weapon storage and wigs for newborns.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 6

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins His Vacation
programme.desc: Adam Conover and his girlfriend take a journey across America, where he reveals that Mount Rushmore was built on stolen Native American land, Vegas slot machines are purposely designed to be addicting, and a whole lot more.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Suburbs
programme.desc: Adam explains that your lawn is an unnatural monstrosity, suburban design is killing you, and the racist past of suburbs led to segregation in schools.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.desc: Ravaged by a flesh eating disease, a young woman needs help to save what's left of her breasts while a southern woman wants her witchy nose gone. A world famous drag queen seeks help for some silicone slip ups.

programme.title: Botched: Bigger Isn't Breast
programme.desc: A former reality TV star seeks a breast reduction after her boobs got huge on Snapchat and a young woman hopes to enlarge her cross-eyed breasts and start dating again.

programme.title: Botched: Lumpy Lipo and Slippy Nippy

programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow has a lot to handle as he hopes to help a cancer survivor reconstruct her breasts and abdomen. A psychic who looks to remove her implants. The doctors try to reason with someone who could potentially become a plastic surgery addict.

programme.title: Botched: A Revision Runs Through It
programme.desc: On the road in Montana, the doctors take a man-cation fly fishing and also check in on a woman who went headfirst into a chain link fence in a horrific motorcycle accident. Plus, a woman recovering from a 'mommy breakover' urgently needs help.

programme.desc: A full-figured teen dreams of dancing on a popular dance show, but ends up in detention instead. The feisty young woman later teaches Baltimore a lesson in dance and integration.

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again
programme.desc: A man, who feels a great deal of regret about his life choices, wishes he could go back in time to change a few things. One morning, he wakes up to find he's been given a second chance to be 17 again.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy tries out righteous sandwiches in this episode. In Austin, a gourmet sandwich shop serves up duck pastrami and a knuckle sandwich. In Vegas, a roast beef po boy is done the Cajun way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far Out
programme.desc: Guy hones in on spots that are doing it different in Syracuse and in Hoboken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Matches Made in Heaven
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's meeting up with credible combos. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the barbecue joint mashin' up a variety of styles for their unique wings and their big time beef ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All San Diego, All the Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's heading to San Diego for some favorites, old and new. In Ocean Beach, Calif., Guy's hittin' up a legendary surfer spot for some righteous burgers with an old buddy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cannoli, Fritters and Wings
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's rolling out for a festival of flavours. In Portland, Ore., the Guamanian food truck is serving up righteous shrimp fritters and a unique spin on chicken salad.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Standards, New Styles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is hitting up spots serving comfort food that has been turned up a notch. In Long Beach, CA., and old school diner with a new chef is cooking some home-style classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creole, Cold Cuts and Crepes
programme.desc: Guy's cookin' up everything from creole to cold cuts to crazy Asian crepes. First, a multi-generational joint bringing New Orleans to Los Angeles with off-the-hook gumbo and etouffee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unique Eats
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is grabbin' some unique eats. First, in Santa Fe, N.M., a not-your-everyday Indian spot servin' up favorites like dosas and lamb curry. Then, a deli in Reno, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Around The World
programme.desc: It's an international affair as Guy Fieri revisits old favourites. The Triple D Nation took notice in Miami when a Latin-inspired place opened a fast-casual joint to serve the masses, and their burger tower is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's firing up an entire world of barbecue on this trip. In Wilmington, a righteous spot is smokin' up chicken salad and off-the-chain chili.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hot Meat and Cool Veg
programme.desc: Modesto, Calif. has Portuguese sausage and lamb burgers. Oakland has a vegan joint with okra gumbo. Also, wings and pork rinds in Islamorada, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unique Eats
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is grabbin' some unique eats. First, in Santa Fe, N.M., a not-your-everyday Indian spot servin' up favorites like dosas and lamb curry. Then, a deli in Reno, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Around The World
programme.desc: It's an international affair as Guy Fieri revisits old favourites. The Triple D Nation took notice in Miami when a Latin-inspired place opened a fast-casual joint to serve the masses, and their burger tower is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's firing up an entire world of barbecue on this trip. In Wilmington, a righteous spot is smokin' up chicken salad and off-the-chain chili.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hot Meat and Cool Veg
programme.desc: Modesto, Calif. has Portuguese sausage and lamb burgers. Oakland has a vegan joint with okra gumbo. Also, wings and pork rinds in Islamorada, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Standards, New Styles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is hitting up spots serving comfort food that has been turned up a notch. In Long Beach, CA., and old school diner with a new chef is cooking some home-style classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creole, Cold Cuts and Crepes
programme.desc: Guy's cookin' up everything from creole to cold cuts to crazy Asian crepes. First, a multi-generational joint bringing New Orleans to Los Angeles with off-the-hook gumbo and etouffee.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Easy Desserts

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Best Barefoot Chocolate Desserts

programme.title: Roseanne: The Monday Through Friday Show

programme.title: Roseanne: Bridge Over Troubled Sonny
programme.desc: Dan doesn't understand Crystal's devotion to her deceased husband (who had cheated on her numerous times). Darlene is confused by her parents' reactions to her new smoking habit.

programme.title: Roseanne: Father's Day
programme.desc: Roseanne is forced into the role of peacemaker between Dan and his father during a weekend visit.

programme.title: Roseanne: Nightmare on Oak Street
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan struggle to handle Darlene's transition into womanhood.

programme.title: Roseanne: Mall Story
programme.desc: The Conner family spends the day together at the mall. Unfortunately, family time turns into a disaster when Roseanne and Becky disagree over a party dress, Darlene goes on a junk food binge, and Dan gets in a tight squeeze.

programme.title: Roseanne: Becky's Choice
programme.desc: Roseanne invites Chip and his parents over for a dinner party on the same night Becky has plans with her secret other boyfriend. Chip's family and the Conners come to blows in a battle of the classes.

programme.title: Roseanne: Slice of Life
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan fear the worst when Darlene is rushed to the hospital for an emergency appendectomy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Workin' Overtime
programme.desc: Roseanne's balancing act of motherhood and heavy overtime at work reaches a boiling point. Having been pushed to the edge, Roseanne runs away to a diner.

programme.title: Roseanne: Toto, We're Not in Kansas Anymore
programme.desc: The Conners worry about Jackie's whereabouts as a tornado spins through Lanford.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: An Old Flame With a New Wick
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to meet with a former girlfriend who broke his heart, but he is in for a surprise when he discovers that she is now a man named Bill. After managing to overcome his shock, Charlie's new friendship is jeopardized when Bill dates Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Penguin Parent Drama
programme.desc: Spring is in the air at Chester Zoo and many of the animals are giving birth. Penguin parents Indigo and Amber are bringing up their new chicks, Munch and McCoy. But an outbreak of disease in the colony leaves Munch fighting for his life.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Snakes in a Zoo
programme.desc: Reticulated pythons, 'Jodie Foster' and Bali, are two of the most dangerous animals at the zoo. When a window is broken in their habitat, keepers have to find a way of distracting these man-eating creatures so that the repair work can be completed.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Different Mission
programme.desc: Earl takes the lead in restoring an abandoned Rottweiler to health. A service dog organization from North Carolina reaches out to Villalobos searching for a new dog for their program. M2 goes on her second rescue, taking in an owner surrender.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Tip of the Iceberg
programme.desc: After Tia and Sugar rescue a stray, they are shocked by what they find and race him to the vet. New worker Darius pursues his dream of working in the veterinary field. And an empty nester heads to Villalobos looking for a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A local woman calls Tia to surrender puppies that she can't care for anymore, but Tia is shocked by what she finds. Months after their house was destroyed in a fire, M2 and Kanani prepare to move into their new home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Finding a Hero
programme.desc: A disabled veteran and his wife come to Villalobos to find a pair of dogs to help with his depression. Marcel and Mariah race to help a puppy in need.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Tia and Country Matt team up to rescue a reportedly aggressive dog. When a local student wants to adopt a dog that can join her on runs, Earl joins in the training regimen. And, parolee Jammall oversees the care of a dog with serious health issues.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last of the Mobsters
programme.desc: Tia and her kids race to rescue a stray dog near a dangerous, busy highway. An adoption requires some temperament testing in an 18-wheel truck when a trucker wants to adopt a dog to join him on the road. And, a return adopter seeks out a senior dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Here in Their Golden Years
programme.desc: Wanting to give the senior dogs a special place, Lizzy, Tania, and Mariah create a 'retirement center' at one of the warehouses.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot King Cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Movie: House Party 3
programme.desc: After a man becomes engaged to a beautiful girl, he begins to anxiously fear matrimony.

programme.desc: Martin and Gina break up after an argument over a Valentine's Day gift.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Two)
programme.desc: After the breakup with Gina, Cole and Tommy take Martin out to meet new women.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Discovering A New Rhythm In The Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Ready to leave the snow behind, an adventurous Ohio couple looks for a new home in Punta Cana, Dominican Republic. They look for a modern condo close to the beach that has privacy, lots of amenities and enough space for friends and family to visit.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Back to Barbados
programme.desc: A busy lawyer from Toronto is moving back to her home country of Barbados to be closer to her family, spend more time on the beach and create a slower pace of life.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Florida Windfall
programme.desc: A Florida couple won the state's biggest scratcher prize, a cool $15 million! David Bromstad steps in to help them decide whether they should buy a luxurious beachfront condo or move into a larger home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: A $5 million lottery win has one lucky New York woman looking for a lakefront vacation cottage where she can relax with her girlfriends.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: California Chick House
programme.desc: A young-at-heart grandmother wants to buy the perfect "chick house" after a $785,000 PowerBall win. David Bromstad helps her find an adorable home big enough to entertain her huge family but small enough to maintain by herself.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Champaign Moments
programme.desc: Scott bought a "22" scratch card at a local garage because it was Paige's lucky number. A million dollar win later, the couple is looking to upgrade their family home in Champaign.

programme.desc: A Navy pilot enlists the help of his Naval Academy roommate to find a slice of paradise on Oahu. He hopes to find a place that's move-in ready, with air conditioning to battle the tropical heat.
